changelog: New ticket: status selector moved out of Advanced section — visible immediately as pill selector
New ticket: timer now persists across page navigation and browser restarts via localStorage
New ticket: timer automatically stops and saves when ticket is submitted (no more orphaned running timers)
New ticket: draft timer appears in sidebar Active Timers on all pages with live elapsed time
New ticket: browser notification when draft timer exceeds configured alert threshold (Settings > Time Tracking)
New ticket: removed dead code path for manual_duration_minutes fallback
